title: Intraplate strain rate variations associated with reservoir-triggered seismicity: A case study from Koyna, Western India
authors: Himanshu Chaube, Anup K. Sutar, Uma Shankar, Sukanta Roy
apa: Himanshu Chaube, Anup K. Sutar, Uma Shankar, Sukanta Roy (2026). Intraplate strain rate variations associated with reservoir-triggered seismicity: A case study from Koyna, Western India. Geodesy and Geodynamics.
